mapper.sql: taskId, projectId, projectType, contractNo, taskTypeCode, taskTypeId, eventPlanHappenDate, eventPlanHappenDateENG, planStartTime, planEndTime, actualStartTime, eventActualFinishDate, progress, status, parentId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, visibleFlag, deliverFileIds, customeInfo
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_task (taskId, projectId, projectType, contractNo, taskTypeCode, taskTypeId, eventPlanHappenDate, eventPlanHappenDateENG, planStartTime, planEndTime, actualStartTime, eventActualFinishDate, progress, status, parentId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, visibleFlag, deliverFileIds, customeInfo, remark) values (#{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customeInfo,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

update pm_project_task
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
contractNo = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
planStartTime = #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
planEndTime = #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parentId = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
visibleFlag = #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customeInfo = #{customeInfo,jdbcType=CHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where taskId = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_project_task set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, contractNo = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, planStartTime = #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, planEndTime = #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parentId = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, visibleFlag = #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customeInfo = #{customeInfo,jdbcType=CHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where taskId = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

mapper.select:
select * from pm_project_task
taskId = #{taskId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
contractNo = #{contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planStartTime = #{planStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planEndTime = #{planEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
progress = #{progress, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customeInfo = #{customeInfo, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND

select count(1) from pm_project_task
taskId = #{taskId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
contractNo = #{contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planStartTime = #{planStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planEndTime = #{planEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
progress = #{progress, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
visibleFlag = #{visibleFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customeInfo = #{customeInfo, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND

select * from pm_project_task
taskId = #{model.taskId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
contractNo = #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeCode = #{model.taskTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeId = #{model.taskTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eventPlanHappenDate = #{model.eventPlanHappenDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{model.eventPlanHappenDateENG, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planStartTime = #{model.planStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planEndTime = #{model.planEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
actualStartTime = #{model.actualStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventActualFinishDate = #{model.eventActualFinishDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
progress = #{model.progress, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parentId = #{model.parentId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
visibleFlag = #{model.visibleFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
deliverFileIds = #{model.deliverFileIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customeInfo = #{model.customeInfo, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or taskTypeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or taskTypeId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or visibleFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or deliverFileIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customeInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_project_task
taskId = #{model.taskId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
contractNo = #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeCode = #{model.taskTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
taskTypeId = #{model.taskTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eventPlanHappenDate = #{model.eventPlanHappenDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{model.eventPlanHappenDateENG, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planStartTime = #{model.planStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
planEndTime = #{model.planEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
actualStartTime = #{model.actualStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
eventActualFinishDate = #{model.eventActualFinishDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
progress = #{model.progress, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
parentId = #{model.parentId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
visibleFlag = #{model.visibleFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
deliverFileIds = #{model.deliverFileIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customeInfo = #{model.customeInfo, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or taskTypeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or taskTypeId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or visibleFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or deliverFileIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customeInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
